headline: Hoto's PixelDrive screwdriver is down to $60, matching its best price
summary: Hoto's PixelDrive cordless screwdriver is currently on sale for $59.99 at Amazon. This deal matches its lowest price ever, saving buyers $20. It's ideal for assembling furniture or repairing electronics.

headline: America's greatest idea is still under threat
summary: The United States recently celebrated its 250th anniversary with global fanfare. Despite widespread celebration, the article posits that America's core ideals are under threat. It implies a broader discussion on policy and foundational principles.

headline: Five questions for Dr. Rubin, who's armed with a mic and a bowtie
summary: Dr. Zachary Rubin is highlighted as an expert committed to informing the public of the truth. He actively combats the spread of online misinformation and viral falsehoods. The article features an interview with the highly-trained individual.

headline: Former Xbox studios Double Fine and Compulsion will keep games after going indie
summary: Microsoft is spinning off four of its Xbox game studios as part of a restructuring effort. Double Fine Productions and Compulsion Games will transition to independent studios. Crucially, these two studios will retain their entire game catalogs and franchises.

headline: Walmart Has a Decent 512GB Nintendo Switch 2 Memory Card Deal Despite the Price Hikes
summary: Walmart is offering a notable deal on a 512GB memory card for the upcoming Nintendo Switch 2. This deal stands out amidst general price increases for memory cards. Players will eventually need more space for their Switch 2 games.

headline: Save 50% Off the Lokithor J2250 Pro Cordless Car Jump Starter With LiFePO4 Batteries
summary: You can save 50% on the Lokithor J2250 Pro cordless car jump starter. It features advanced LiFePO4 batteries for superior performance. LiFePO4 models are safer, last longer, and work better in cold weather.

headline: Steam Machine vs PS5: How Does Valve's New Mini PC Stack Up?
summary: This article directly compares Valve's new Steam Machine mini PC against the PlayStation 5 console. It analyzes the features, performance, and user experience of both gaming platforms. The comparison aims to help potential buyers weigh their options.

headline: How to Build a Better Steam Machine for (Slightly) Less
summary: The article provides a guide on how to construct an improved Steam Machine. It details methods to achieve better performance than off-the-shelf models. Tips are included for building your own Steam Machine for a reduced cost.

headline: Watch: Belgium make light work of US to set up quarter-final tie with Spain
summary: Belgium comfortably defeated a defensively struggling USA in a recent football match. This victory secured Belgium a place in the quarter-finals against Spain. The game was overshadowed by controversy regarding Folarin Balogun's delayed suspension.

headline: MI5 knew agent was misogynist 'obsessed' with violence, watchdog finds
summary: A secret inquiry found MI5 was aware an agent, known as 'Agent X', was misogynistic and obsessed with violence. The security service's watchdog concluded there were 'serious failings' in MI5's management of the agent. The findings highlight significant internal oversight issues.

headline: Jailers and officials at Russia's 'torture prisons' in Ukraine exposed by BBC
summary: The BBC has exposed individuals identified as jailers and officials in alleged Russian 'torture prisons' in Ukraine. Former prisoners have accused these men of severe abuse in detention centers. Victims are seeking to bring these individuals to trial for their actions.

headline: Zelensky to press Nato for air defence systems after intense Russian strikes
summary: Ukrainian President Zelensky plans to push NATO for more advanced air defence systems. His plea follows a recent wave of intense Russian strikes across Ukraine. Zelensky will argue for additional interceptor missiles during the upcoming NATO meeting in Turkey.
